g.text: Adaptor Design Pattern :- Simple connecting the 2 incompatible interfaces we add
adaptor class btw them simple just like adaptor works, socket adaptor or anyother
adaptor to make 2 impatible things compatible
Defination:- Adaptor Converts the interface of a class into another interface that client expects, Adapter lets classes
work together that could not otherwise because of incompatible interface.
THIS IS AN OBJECT ADAPTORS - USING COMPOSITION
WE ALSO HAVE CLASS ADAPTOR - USING INHERITANCE
but always prefer Composition over Inheritance
- Integrating the 3rd party library to out code, create an adaptor to talk to 3rd party library is required.
- To talk with some lagecy code that methods are deprecated so to use that simple add adaptor in the btw
